text:
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert indicating a permanent failure with 429 rate limiting in the Daily Pipeline.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence report from Jeeves system noting Tavily API usage at 80% of June limit.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence report from Jeeves system flagging urgent escalation from Andrew Lang requiring immediate attention.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch asks about CG site updates and questions a white Interdisciplinary statement on the site.
- [reply needed] Zamzar Limited: Zamzar billing team reports failed payment and requests updated payment details.
- [decision required] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch requests a button be added to the Presentations page linking to past presentations.
- [decision required] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch repeats a request for a Past Presentations button on the Presentations page.
- [scheduling] Peter Nordlund: Peter Nordlund invites Matt and Michael to a June 19 Scriptural Reasoning event and asks about bringing fruit.
- [no action] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch shares an update on the final proofing and indexing timeline for FODA.
- [no action] "Superhuman – Zain Kahn": Superhuman newsletter about Anthropic's CEO and a dictation tool for Android.
